# Demo: Restaurant (Restauracja)

> A demo website for a premium restaurant, built by freelance web developer Konrad
> Malinowski as part of his portfolio. React 19 + TypeScript with TanStack Query —
> a static frontend with simulated ordering and reservations that shows prospective
> clients what their own restaurant website could look like.

The site content is in Polish. All data (menu, events, reviews) is mock data; the
cart, three-step checkout, and table reservations are simulated client-side with no
backend.

## Features

- Menu with search and filters (vegetarian, gluten-free, bestsellers)
- Table reservation with an interactive calendar
- Cart and online ordering with a three-step checkout flow
- Events calendar (tastings, concerts, themed dinners)
- Dish gallery designed to make the food look good; fully responsive, mobile-first

## Tech

- React 19, TypeScript, Vite, React Router 7
- TanStack Query 5 (server-state), Zustand (cart), React Hook Form + Zod (validation)
- Framer Motion (animations), Tailwind CSS
